name: Australia National Security Architecture — Senior Leadership KPV Assessment
description: KPV assessment of Australian national security senior leadership. Sources: AGD public org, ASIO annual reports, ASD public charter, FIRB annual reports, DCI public statements.

roles.title: Director-General, Office of National Intelligence
roles.notes: ONI Director-General; Five Eyes IC coordination. Pine Gap JDF relationship knowledge. Source: ONI public charter; National Security Legislation Amendment Act 2018.

roles.title: Director-General, ASIO
roles.notes: Domestic security; FARA/foreign interference investigations. 'Beneficial owner blind spot' language in 2023 PJCIS testimony. Source: ASIO Annual Threat Assessment 2024.

roles.title: Director-General, Australian Signals Directorate
roles.notes: SIGINT and active cyber; AUKUS cyber partnership. Five Eyes ASD contribution. Source: ASD public charter; AUKUS cyber workstream.

roles.title: Director-General, ASIS
roles.notes: HUMINT collection; Indo-Pacific relationship network. Source: Intelligence Services Act 2001; AGD public descriptions.

roles.title: Chair, Foreign Investment Review Board
roles.notes: FIRB screening of agricultural land near Pine Gap/Garden Island. 'Beneficial owner blind spot' in non-operating asset transactions. Source: FIRB Annual Report 2022-23; Foreign Acquisitions and Takeovers Act 1975.

roles.title: Commander, Joint Defence Facility Pine Gap
roles.notes: Joint facility (AUS/US). Agricultural land acquisition proximity concern documented in FIRB 2022-24. Source: JDF Pine Gap public charter; DND public statements.

roles.title: Director, Australian Cyber Security Centre
roles.notes: ACSC; critical infrastructure cyber protection. Source: ACSC public org.

roles.title: Lynas Rare Earths CEO (Strategic Processing Partner)
roles.notes: Corporate KPV — critical to AUKUS/CICP processing architecture. DoD DPA Title III bilateral. Only significant non-Chinese REE separation globally. Source: Lynas ASX filings; DoD DPA Title III contract FY2023.
